_meta.renderer_state: post round-3 fix — also skip /dev /sys /proc /run/udev in :Z relabel (gladys mounted /dev:/dev)
_meta.skipped_apps_reason: windows requires nested KVM (Linode dedicated CPU plan only); ollama-nvidia requires NVIDIA GPU

results.note: container starts then crashes on cscli machines add — SQLite 'attempt to write a readonly database' / 'unable to insert row'. Multi-container init race; not a podman-side bug
image niruix/sshwifty:0.4.3 returns 'manifest unknown' from docker.io; upstream tag deleted. seed_apps.json.gz needs a tag bump
binary requires >= 2 interface args; default compose passes 0. user-config required, not a bug
validates podman-compose 1.5 handling of depends_on condition: service_completed_successfully (issue #575) — works in this version
Linode VM has /dev/net/tun by default; container started cleanly
first attempt failed with 'SELinux relabeling of /dev is not allowed' — fixed in renderer by skipping /dev /sys /proc /run/udev in :Z relabel
image koush/scrypted:20 returns 'manifest unknown' from docker.io; same class as sshwifty

skipped_with_reason.reason: needs /dev/kvm (nested virt); standard Linode shared-CPU plans do not expose it
needs NVIDIA GPU; CDI configuration covered in docs/nvidia-gpu.md

fixes_committed_during_validation: cd62bc4 (initial fix bundle): install.sh short-name registries + (later removed) setsebool, renderer.go :Z relabel, docs/selinux.md type correction
67fd610 (proper docker.sock fix): renderer.go injectSocketLabelDisable for security_opt: [label=disable]; ports-block bug fix in :Z relabel; setsebool dropped from install.sh

round-3 fix: renderer.go skips /dev /sys /proc /run/udev in :Z relabel (Podman refuses to relabel pseudofs); harness ps-readiness check is now a 10s poll instead of single 3s sleep to handle heavyweight images that briefly transition through Created
